zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Eleanor Douglas of Douglas - Countess of Carrick於大約1320年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾道格拉斯時，她的父親Sir Archibald Douglas , the Tyneman, 4th Lord of Douglas24歲，母親Lady Beatrice de Lindsay - Baroness Douglas36歲。她於1333年與Alexander Bruce 8th Earl of Carrick結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1390年在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾享年72歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭澤爾吉爾可爾梅露絲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Eleanor Douglas of Douglas - Countess of Carrick于大约1320年出生在苏格兰藍納可爾道格拉斯时，她的父亲Sir Archibald Douglas , the Tyneman, 4th Lord of Douglas24岁，母亲Lady Beatrice de Lindsay - Baroness Douglas36岁。她于1333年与Alexander Bruce 8th Earl of Carrick结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1390年在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾享年72岁，埋葬在苏格兰澤爾吉爾可爾梅露絲。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Eleanor Douglas of Douglas - Countess of Carrick was born about 1320, in Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland, her father, Sir Archibald Douglas , the Tyneman, 4th Lord of Douglas, was 24 and her mother, Lady Beatrice de Lindsay - Baroness Douglas, was 36. She married Alexander Bruce 8th Earl of Carrick in 1333. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1390, in Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 72, and was buried in Melrose, Selkirkshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Eleanor Douglas of Douglas - Countess of Carrick est née environ 1320, à Douglas, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Archibald Douglas , the Tyneman, 4th Lord of Douglas, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Lady Beatrice de Lindsay - Baroness Douglas, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Alexander Bruce 8th Earl of Carrick en 1333. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1390, à Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterrée à Melrose, Selkirkshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Eleanor Douglas of Douglas - Countess of Carrick um 1320 in Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Archibald Douglas , the Tyneman, 4th Lord of Douglas 24 und ihre Mutter Lady Beatrice de Lindsay - Baroness Douglas 36. Sie hat 1333 Alexander Bruce 8th Earl of Carrick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1390 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Haddingtonshire, Scotland und wurde in Melrose, Selkirkshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Eleanor Douglas of Douglas - Countess of Carrick è nata il circa 1320 nel Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir Archibald Douglas , the Tyneman, 4th Lord of Douglas, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Lady Beatrice de Lindsay - Baroness Douglas, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Alexander Bruce 8th Earl of Carrick nel 1333. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1390, nel Haddingtonshire, Scotland, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolta a Melrose, Selkirkshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor Douglas of Douglas - Countess of Carrickが約1320年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアドウグラスで生まれた時，父Sir Archibald Douglas , the Tyneman, 4th Lord of Douglasは24歳，母Lady Beatrice de Lindsay - Baroness Douglasは36歳であった。1333年にAlexander Bruce 8th Earl of Carrickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1390年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアで72歳で死去し，スコットランドセルキルクシュアイアメルローゼにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor Douglas of Douglas - Countess of Carrick(이)가 대략 1320년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 더글라스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Archibald Douglas , the Tyneman, 4th Lord of Douglas(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Beatrice de Lindsay - Baroness Douglas(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1333년 Alexander Bruce 8th Earl of Carrick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1390년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 셀커크실르 멜로즈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Eleanor Douglas of Douglas - Countess of Carrick nasceu aproximadamente 1320, em Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Archibald Douglas , the Tyneman, 4th Lord of Douglas, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Lady Beatrice de Lindsay - Baroness Douglas, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Alexander Bruce 8th Earl of Carrick em 1333. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1390, em Haddingtonshire, Scotland, com 72 anos, e foi sepultada em Melrose, Selkirkshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Eleanor Douglas of Douglas - Countess of Carrick родилась около 1320 г. в местности доуглас, ланаркшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Archibald Douglas , the Tyneman, 4th Lord of Douglas было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Beatrice de Lindsay - Baroness Douglas, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander Bruce 8th Earl of Carrick в 1333 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1390 г. в местности хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 72 лет и была похоронена в местности мелрос, селкиркшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Eleanor Douglas of Douglas - Countess of Carrick nació aproximadamente 1320, en Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Archibald Douglas , the Tyneman, 4th Lord of Douglas, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Lady Beatrice de Lindsay - Baroness Douglas, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Alexander Bruce 8th Earl of Carrick en 1333. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1390, en Haddingtonshire, Scotland, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultada en Melrose, Selkirkshire, Scotland.
